Traders and analysts are now closely observing larger technical patterns, such as wedge and channel formations, for indications of a potential long-term breakout.

title: Bitcoin peels back to $62K as Fed-wary futures traders cut risk: Is the BTC rally over?
content: Bitcoin hovered around the $62,000 mark following a spike in oil prices, escalating hot war in Iran and traders’ move to cut risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.
summary: Bitcoin's price dipped to approximately $62,000. This decline is attributed to a combination of factors, including a spike in oil prices, the escalating conflict in Iran, and traders reducing risk ahead of a Federal Reserve policy statement.

title: Bank of Japan may speed up rate hikes, pushing borrowing costs above 2%, ex-BOJ official warns
content: Former BOJ official issues interest-rate warning as yen continues to slide against the dollar.
summary: A former Bank of Japan official warned that the bank may speed up its interest rate hikes, potentially pushing borrowing costs above 2%, due to the yen's continued decline against the dollar. This warning comes as the yen slides against the US currency. The warning may impact Japan's economy and monetary policy.

Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips to…
summary: A California dairy farmer is using worms and microbes to reduce manure pollution, a potential solution for environmental issues. This approach is part of a larger trend in using technology and nature to combat pollution. The method involves using worms to break down manure, reducing pollution and creating a more sustainable farming practice.

title: A device that revives eyeballs from dead donors could make eye transplants possible
content: It’s not easy to transplant a whole human eye. The surgery is difficult. And the eyes themselves start to degenerate as soon as they’ve left the body. When surgeons attempted it a few years ago, the newly transplanted eye wasn’t able to see. But researchers believe they might have a solution: a device that maintains…
summary: Researchers have developed a device that can keep eyeballs from deceased donors alive, preventing degeneration that typically occurs after removal. This breakthrough could enable successful whole-eye transplants, a procedure that has previously failed due to the eye's rapid loss of function post-mortem.

title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
content: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.
summary: Lovable is reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B through a $300 million funding round led by Menlo Ventures. This significant investment could indicate a major expansion for the company. The deal's details have been reported by Sifted.

title: Former OpenAI exec Kevin Weil is now on the board of Stoke Space
content: Kevin Weil's new role at Stoke Space suggests reusable rockets are the next hot thing in Silicon Valley.
summary: Kevin Weil, a former OpenAI executive, has joined the board of Stoke Space, indicating growing interest in reusable rockets in Silicon Valley. Weil's involvement may bring new perspectives to the space technology industry. This move could have implications for the intersection of technology and space exploration.

title: Data centers’ energy demand threatens Trump’s “Made in America” plan
content: Squeeze on Rust Belt electricity bills threatens Trump’s manufacturing plan.
summary: The energy demand of data centers is threatening Donald Trump's Made in America plan by squeezing Rust Belt electricity bills, which could impact manufacturing. This could hinder Trump's goal of revitalizing American industry. Data centers' high energy consumption is a significant contributor to this issue.

title: Trump asked Musk for SpaceX stock to seed US kids’ savings accounts, report says
content: Sources suggest Musk may be mulling big donation to Trump Accounts.
summary: According to sources, former President Trump approached Elon Musk about a large donation of SpaceX stock to fund savings accounts for American children. The report suggests Musk is considering a sizable contribution to the Trump-backed initiative.

title: Four nuclear reactors hit a big milestone in the US
content: I was really looking forward to July 4, and not just because I love a poolside barbecue. This year the American holiday also marked a big symbolic deadline for US nuclear power. Last year the Trump administration set a goal to see three new microreactors achieve criticality, a technical milestone establishing that a reactor can…
summary: Four US nuclear reactors have achieved a significant milestone, reaching criticality, a technical milestone showing a reactor can sustain a nuclear chain reaction. This achievement was set as a goal by the Trump administration last year. The reactors are microreactors, a newer type of nuclear reactor.

title: Why worms (and microbes) are catching on as a manure pollution solution
content: Anthony Agueda, a third-generation California dairy farmer, pulls a rake through a bed of dark, wet wood chips on his family’s land in Hickman, a tiny town in the state’s agricultural heartland. He reaches down with both hands and pulls up a clump of muck, turning it over to reveal a half-dozen squirming red earthworms.…
summary: A California dairy farmer is using worms and microbes to address manure pollution on his land, a potential solution for the agricultural industry. The method involves using earthworms to break down manure in wood chips. This approach could help reduce pollution and create a more sustainable farming practice.
